name: Perfios
description: Indian financial data platform providing bank statement analysis, credit decisioning, KYC and fraud APIs for BFSI.

seo.title: Perfios — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Perfios: Indian financial data platform providing bank statement analysis, credit decisioning, KYC and fraud APIs for BFSI.

when_to_use: Bank statement analysis API for Indian NBFC underwriting
GST and ITR-based income verification for lending KYC
Fraud detection from financial transaction pattern analysis
Account aggregation for PFM apps under AA framework
Credit decisioning data enrichment for Indian digital lending

pros: Bank statement analysis deeply tuned for India
Credit decisioning APIs for BFSI pre-built
KYC plus fraud checks under one roof
cons: Broader than KYC-only, can feel over-scoped
API polish lags newer Indian fintech vendors
review.verdict: India's go-to bank statement analytics and decisioning stack; pick Signzy for simpler KYC-only needs.
review.best_for: Indian banks, NBFCs and lenders running underwriting and bank statement analysis at volume
review.not_for: Teams outside India or those only needing basic KYC without credit decisioning infrastructure

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
